outage_warning: POWER ALERT: {prob} chance of outage in your area at {time}. Charge devices now.
outage_confirmed: OUTAGE CONFIRMED in your area. Reported by multiple users. Expected duration unknown.
outage_resolved: POWER RESTORED in your area. Outage lasted approximately {duration} minutes.
welcome: Welcome to Blackout Predictor! You will receive alerts when outages are predicted in your area.
test: This is a test message from Blackout Predictor. Your SMS alerts are working correctly.
